title: Ransomware Lockout: National Health Data
context: A major hospital network reports encryption of patient records. The attacker demands 50 BTC. The Ministry of Health is unaware. Public rumors are starting on social media.

options.text: Immediate Isolation: Cut off all hospital internet connections to stop spread.
options.narrative_consequence: Spread stopped, but emergency surgeries are delayed. Public panic rises due to lack of communication.

options.text: Containment & Communication: Isolate only affected servers and issue a public statement acknowledging investigation.
options.narrative_consequence: Trust maintained, but attacker moves laterally to backup systems. Investigation slowed by media inquiries.

options.text: Pay the Ransom: Negotiate payment to restore services quickly.
options.narrative_consequence: Services restored, but legal exposure is massive. International sanctions risk. Precedent set for future attacks.
